1.title: Who am I?
1.subtitle: Anthony Huang, 18, Student 🇨🇦⚜️🇨🇳
1.description:
Hey! I'm Anthony Huang, a 18-year-old Chinese-Canadian 🇨🇦⚜️🇨🇳 university student based in Ottawa.

I'm passionate about all things tech 💻, whether it's geeking out over computer history and cool modern tech, hunting for vintage hardware (I collect Apple products), repairing devices, or solving problems through software and code.

Outside of tech, I'm into geography 🌎, languages 💬, Japanese media 🎌, vlogging and editing 🎬, sports ⚽️🏒, and travelling ✈️.

2.title: Education
2.subtitle: 1st Year Computer Science @ CarletonU 🎓
2.description:
I am a first-year Computer Science 💻 student at Carleton University 🎓. I am also pursuing a minor in Linguistics.

In High School, I completed the International Baccalaureate Diploma Programme (IBDP) and Ontario Secondary School Diploma (OSSD) with a French Immersion Certificate. I also served as Co-President of the Computer Science Club.

3.title: Programming
3.subtitle: Web Developer, 2x Hackathon Winner 👨‍💻
3.description:
I currently specialize in Web Development 🌐. I primarily work with a simple stack consisting of Vanilla HTML/SCSS/JavaScript, Node/Express and Linux.

Almost everything I know in this field is self-taught. I started programming at 8 years old when I stumbled across the p5.js course on Khan Academy.

I've participated in 6 Hackathons, winning 🏆 in 2 of them.

4.title: Languages
4.subtitle: English, French, Chinese, Japanese, Korean 💬
4.description:
I speak English 🇬🇧, French 🇫🇷, Mandarin 🇨🇳, Japanese 🇯🇵, Learning Korean 🇰🇷.

I was born and raised in Québec in a Chinese household. I lived in a primarily Anglophone community, but still used French as a primary language. I then moved to Ontario, where English became my primary language, but I continued to take French classes at school. English 🇬🇧 is my mother tongue, and I hold a DELF B2 certificate in French 🇫🇷.

I can speak fluent conversational Mandarin 🇨🇳 as I primarily use it at home.

My interest in Japanese 🇯🇵 began in 2023, sparked by Anime, J-Pop and a trip to Japan. I currently hold a JLPT N3 certificate.

I am currently learning Korean 🇰🇷 in University as an elective.

5.title: Entertainment
5.subtitle: 60+ Days of Anime, J-Pop & Hololive ☄️
5.description:
I watch a lot of anime, mainly new releases & recent romcoms. Click the Open button to check out my MAL profile to see what I watch and my favorites!

I love J-Pop, and it is mainly the only genre I listen to. I enjoy listening to mainly Reiwa-era female artists (e.g. Ado, Lilas Ikuta). You can learn more about my favorites in the Music app.

I got into Hololive to improve my Japanese listening skills. 最推し → ☄️

6.title: Travel
6.subtitle: 7 Countries Visited ✈️
6.description:
I hope to travel the world in the future. So far, I've been to 7 countries 🇨🇦🇺🇸🇧🇸🇨🇺🇨🇳🇯🇵🇰🇷. You can see where I've been & where I want to go by clicking Open on this app!

I'm also a railfan and somewhat an avgeek. I love exploring the urban rail systems of cities I visit. I've flown ~70,000 km (~100 hours) on 15 flights since 2023. My favorite airports include Incheon 🇰🇷 (ICN), Vancouver 🇨🇦 (YVR), and Shenzhen Bao'an 🇨🇳 (SZX).

7.title: Games
7.subtitle: Currently Playing: Geotastic 🎮
7.description:
My all-time favorite game is Geometry Dash, with over 1000 hours on Steam, and 63 Demons completed. My hardest is Future Funk (Hard Demon) and I had a 72% PB on Acu (Extreme Demon) before I stopped playing.

My other favorite games include Minecraft, Roblox, Rocket League (💎 D2 Peak), Geotastic (9x 🇯🇵 State Streak), Minesweeper (🇨🇦 Top 500), and Tetris (🇨🇦 Top 1000).
